title: HPSC Superintendent Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 4 Superintendent (Legal) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official HPSC website. The last date to submit the application form is 02.06.2026.

age_limit.details: For General Male / Other State Male: Rs. 1000/- For General Female / Other State Female: Rs. 250/- BC-A / BC-B / SC / EWS / ESM Candidates of Haryana: Rs. 250/- PwBD Candidates of Haryana: Nil

qualification.details: B.A L.L.B. Knowledge of Hindi upto Matric Standard; and who has held an assignment involving legal work for a period of not less than ten Years; OR Has practiced at the bar for a period ofnot less than five years

vacancy_details.Post Name: Superintendent (Legal) Group-B in Law and Legislative Department, Haryana

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HPSC Superintendent (Legal) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02.06.2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HPSC to complete the application.
